Google.Instructions: Get from: https://console.cloud.google.com/ > APIs & Services > Credentials

Facebook.Instructions: Get from: https://developers.facebook.com/ > My Apps > Your App > Settings > Basic

Microsoft.Instructions: Get from: https://portal.azure.com/ > Azure Active Directory > App registrations

Setup: 1. Rename this file to appsettings.Development.OAuth.json or add to User Secrets
2. Get OAuth credentials from each provider's developer console
3. Configure redirect URIs in each provider:
4. For production, use environment variables or Azure Key Vault

GoogleSetup.Step2: Create a new project or select existing
GoogleSetup.Step6: Copy Client ID and Client Secret

FacebookSetup.Step2: Create a new app or select existing
FacebookSetup.Step5: Copy App ID and App Secret

MicrosoftSetup.Step2: Navigate to Azure Active Directory > App registrations
MicrosoftSetup.Step5: Create client secret under Certificates & secrets
MicrosoftSetup.Step6: Copy Application (client) ID and Client Secret
